hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; bash "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh"

u=$(git -C "$PWD" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null); case "$u" in */DTVMStack/DTVM|*/DTVMStack/DTVM.git|*/abmcar/DTVM|*/abmcar/DTVM.git) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[ci-monitor] Push to DTVM detected. In the BACKGROUND: 1) Run gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,workflowName,headBranch to find the triggered run. 2) Run gh run watch <id> --exit-status in background. 3) On completion, if failed: gh run view <id> --log-failed and diagnose. If passed: briefly report. Do NOT interrupt your current task for this."}}' ;; esac
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/stop_validation.py" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; python3 "$d/.claude/hooks/stop_validation.py"
